sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 425 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.22. 2. For orders on CMA No.2328/2019. 3. For hearing of main case. 12.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. Counsel adverts to paragraph 30 of the impugned order which reads as follows: “30. Lastly, but not the least the Revenue department is at its liberty to conduct audit as provided U/s 25 of the Sales Tax Acct 1990 and thereafter pass a legal appealable speaking order U/s. 11 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990 after affording proper and reasonable opportunity of being heard to the registered persons.” In view hereof learned counsel states that this reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
